# AuraPal

> Free AI Career Engine — 8 AI-powered tools to build resumes, cover letters, prep for interviews, roast LinkedIn profiles, find jobs, check salaries, and validate startup ideas.

🎁 LAUNCH PROMO: Pro plan is FREE for every user who signs up before October 1, 2026. No credit card required. Premium is $19/month launch price (was $49).

AuraPal helps job seekers, founders, and creators land better opportunities with brutally honest, AI-powered feedback.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of all 8 free AI career tools.
- [About](/about): Mission and how AuraPal works.
- [Features](/features): Full feature list across all tools.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro (FREE until Oct 1, 2026) and Premium ($19/mo launch price).
- [Blog](/blog): Career tips, resume guides, and AI insights.

## Tools

- [AI Resume Roast](/ai-resume-roast): Brutal 0–100 resume feedback in 15s.
- [Free Resume Roast](/ai-resume-roast-free): Same roast, no signup wall.
- [Free Salary Checker](/salary-checker-free): Find out if you're underpaid.
- [Startup Idea Validator](/startup-idea-validator): Score your idea 0–100 + get a 14-day MVP plan.
- [Job Finder](/jobs): Search active jobs worldwide by role and city.
- [Aura Agent](/agent): AI Career Agent that runs the right tools in sequence.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
